subcodes.first_line: We make mention of the servants of God and His handmaidens, and We gave them glad tidings in the Dispensation of the Bayán through this Name whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر عباد الله و امائه و بشرناهم فی کور البیان بهذا الاسم الذی به هدر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @prophecy and fulfillment
